articles.name: WEEX is about to Launch SWCH Staking!
articles.title: WEEX is about to Launch SWCH Staking!
articles.body:
Dear WEEX Users,

WEEX will officially launch SWCH Staking on 2026/05/16  10:00 UTC+0 .

 Users can participate in staking directly on the WEEX platform and earn Staking rewards by holding tokens.

Please refer to the on-page information for specific rules and participation details.

SWCH Staking Basic Information

Project Name: SwissCheese

Token Name: SWCH

Staking Type: Fixed
Estimated Annual Percentage Rate (APR): 20%

Supported Platforms: WEEX App / Web

Through WEEX Staking, users can complete subscription, holding, and reward earning directly on the platform without complex on-chain operations or asset transfers.

About Staking

Staking is an asset value-added service launched by WEEX,

designed to help users manage their assets more steadily and achieve long-term returns in a volatile market.

The launch of SWCH Staking provides token holders with a more flexible and convenient way to earn rewards.

articles.name: WE-Launch Result - Optimism (OP)
articles.title: WE-Launch Result - Optimism (OP)
articles.body:
Announcing the conclusion of the new round of WE-Launch: Optimism (OP).   

The result is as follows:

      Total Prize Pool: 60,000 OP

      Total Value of Commit: 1,894,297,277 WXT

      Total Valid Committed Quantity: 2,436,660,845 WXT

      Number of participants:  48,122

      Number of qualified participants: 46,541 

 

*To guarantee transparency and fairness, all original records are stored for possible third-party auditing.

 

📅 Event Period: 2026-05-10 16:00 (UTC+0) — 2026-05-15 16:00 (UTC+0)

 

About Optimism (OP)

Optimism (OP) is a layer-two blockchain on top of Ethereum. Optimism benefits from the security of the Ethereum mainnet and helps scale the Ethereum ecosystem by using optimistic rollups. That means transactions are trustlessly recorded on Optimism but ultimately secured on Ethereum.
 

Additional Information

Website

About ShadowsClaw (SAD)

SAD (SHADOW ANCESTOR TOKEN) is the genesis scarce asset and core value-anchoring token of the SHADOWSCLAW ecosystem.

The total supply of SAD is permanently fixed, and its sole generation method is through the SAC genesis node subscription period. After the node subscription period ends, no further issuance will occur. SAD does not have any airdrops, marketing allocations, or team reserves, truly achieving a fair launch.

SAD will serve as the underlying payment fuel and core token for applications within the SHADOW NETWORK, deeply participating in scenarios such as prediction markets, AI AGENT execution, and on-chain merchant settlement, while enjoying the long-term benefits of platform value growth.

 

Additional Information

articles.name: WEEX WE-Launch -AetherPrivacy AI Network (APAI) Listed & 10,000 USDT Airdrops!
articles.title: WEEX WE-Launch -AetherPrivacy AI Network (APAI) Listed & 10,000 USDT Airdrops!
articles.body:
Announcing the Launch of a New WE-Launch Campaign: AetherPrivacy AI Network (APAI).

 

📅 Event Period: 2026-05-15 07:00 (UTC+0) — 2026-05-18 07:00 (UTC+0)    

🚀 Listing Period:  

  • Deposit: 2026-05-17 08:00 (UTC+0)
  • Trading: 2026-05-18 08:00 (UTC+0)
  • Withdrawal: 2026-05-19 08:00 (UTC+0)    

During the event, by committing WXT, you will have the chance to share 10,000 USDT for free!

Commit WXT through WE-Launch to earn USDT. 

WXT Committing Pool

  • Total Reward: 10,000 USDT
  • Minimum Commit: 300 WXT
  • Maximum Commit: 500,000 WXT

After the WXT committing period ends, the system will calculate the airdrop rewards for each participating user. The actual commit must meet the minimum requirement for each tier, and the effective commit is calculated based on the corresponding tier's commit multiplier. The larger your effective commit percentage, the greater your share of the reward pool.

  • Estimated Reward = Current User's Effective Commit/ Total Effective Commit of All Users * Total Reward Pool;
  • User's Effective commit = User's Actual Stake * Corresponding Tier's Commit Multiplier;

*Commit WXT remains accessible for participation in multiple projects concurrently, without lock-in or staking requirements.

About AetherPrivacy AI Network (APAI)

Powered by Global Privacy Computing Labs. Decentralized Confidential AI Infrastructure.

Additional Information

Website

X account

Terms & Conditions:

  • No fees are required for participation in the WE-Launch event.
  • During the campaign, there are no restrictions on the WXT in your account; you may trade or withdraw at any time.
  • The airdrop snapshot does not include any WXT that is locked.
  • Market makers and project team accounts are not eligible to participate in this campaign.
  • The use of malicious tactics, including wash trading, volume manipulation, the creation of multiple accounts for profit, or falsifying KYC information, to meet campaign qualifications is strictly prohibited. WEEX reserves the right to disqualify participants from the campaign, withhold rewards, and recover any activity rewards credited to accounts.
  • WEEX retains the final interpretation rights of this campaign. The platform reserves the right to adjust or terminate the campaign based on market conditions without prior notice to users. For any inquiries, please contact our online customer services.

articles.name: Diamond Hands Plan" Episode 1: BTC 3% + WXT 2%, Lock-up for 20 Days
articles.title: Diamond Hands Plan" Episode 1: BTC 3% + WXT 2%, Lock-up for 20 Days
articles.body:
Dear WEEX Users,

WEEX will launch the first phase of the Staking "Diamond Hands Plan" from April 15, 2026, 18:00 to May 4, 2026, 18:00 (UTC+8).

Phase 1 Assets:

 

Rules

  • Lock-up period of 20 days. Early redemption will result in forfeiture of all interest.
  • Principal + interest will be automatically credited upon maturity.
  • BTC product is only available to users with ≥0.001 BTC. Small-amount users are advised to continue using the Flexible product.

How to Participate

     1.Go to the Staking page.

     2.Select the 20-day fixed-term product for BTC or WXT.

     3.Enter the amount and confirm the staking.

 

Risk Warning

  • Early redemption during the lock-up period will result in forfeiture of all interest.
  • Price fluctuations of digital assets may lead to loss of principal.

articles.name: Adjustments made to M minimum order sizes
articles.title: Adjustments made to M minimum order sizes
articles.body:
Dear WEEXer,

 

Adjustments have been made to the minimum order sizes of M to further improve your trading experience. These changes will be reflected in the lot quantity displayed, and will not affect the actual placement of orders and copy trading. The change to the minimum order size is as follows:

  1. M minimum order size: The minimum order size was originally 100 M and has been changed to 1 M.
  2. These adjustments are effective from March 31, 2026 at 12:00 (UTC+8). WEEXers are recommended to make any necessary adjustments to your trading plans based on these new minimum order size requirements. There will be a change in the interface displaying the number of lots, but the lowered minimum order size will only affect the displayed amount. WEEXers who have already placed orders will see a change in the quantity of lots (an "increase" of 100×). However, the actual margin, trading volume, transaction fees, and so on are not affected.

  3. How the lot quantity has changed (the specific number of lots is as shown on your display):

    M: 100 M = 1 lots -> 1 M = 1 lots

  4. Reminder: App users should restart the app to ensure the adjustments take effect.

 

We apologize for any inconvenience caused. Please be assured that this is a change made to improve the display only, and does not have any effect on actual trading operations. Thank you for your support and trust in WEEX! We remain committed to improving WEEX to provide better trading services to our users.

-

Thank you for supporting WEEX!

The WEEX Team

-

Download the WEEX App: App Store / Google Play

Contact us:

X | YouTube | Telegram | Medium | Facebook | LinkedIn | Blog

Register your WEEX account now: https://www.weex.com/register

Partners:

CoinMarketCap | Cryptowisser.com | Coingecko | Coincarp

articles.title: WEEX WE-Launch – Dogecoin (DOGE) : Share 100,000 DOGE Airdrop! Complete Tasks to Earn Extra 1,000 USDT!
articles.body:
Announcing the Launch of a New WE-Launch Campaign: Dogecoin (DOGE).

 

 

📅 Event period: 2026-03-27 04:00 (UTC+0) – 2026-04-01 04:00 (UTC+0)      

🚀 Spot trading pair: DOGE/USDT

 

During the event period, commit WXT via WE-Launch to share 100,000 DOGE for free! Complete the net buy task to earn an additional share of 1,000 USDT!

 

Commit WXT through WE-Launch to earn DOGE. 
WXT Committing Pool
  • Total Reward: 100,000 DOGE
  • Minimum Commit: 300 WXT
  • Maximum Commit: 500,000 WXT
After the WXT committing period ends, the system will calculate the airdrop rewards for each participating user. The actual commit must meet the minimum requirement for each tier, and the effective commit is calculated based on the corresponding tier's commit multiplier. The larger your effective commit percentage, the greater your share of the reward pool.
  • Estimated Reward = Current User's Effective Commit/ Total Effective Commit of All Users * Total Reward Pool;
  • User's Effective commit = User's Actual Stake * Corresponding Tier's Commit Multiplier;
*Commit WXT remains accessible for participation in multiple projects concurrently, without lock-in or staking requirements.

 

About Dogecoin (DOGE) 

Dogecoin (DOGE) is based on the popular "doge" Internet meme and features a Shiba Inu on its logo. The open-source digital currency was created by Billy Markus from Portland, Oregon and Jackson Palmer from Sydney, Australia, and was forked from Litecoin in December 2013. Dogecoin's creators envisaged it as a fun, light-hearted cryptocurrency that would have greater appeal beyond the core Bitcoin audience, since it was based on a dog meme.

articles.name: WEEX WE-Launch PRO – Solana (SOL) Phase 2: Share 120 SOL Airdrop! Complete Tasks to Earn Extra 1,000 USDT!
articles.title: WEEX WE-Launch PRO – Solana (SOL) Phase 2: Share 120 SOL Airdrop! Complete Tasks to Earn Extra 1,000 USDT!
articles.body:
Announcing the Launch of a New WE-Launch PRO Campaign: Solana (SOL) Phase 2.

 

 

📅 Event period: 2026-03-22 04:00 (UTC+0) – 2026-03-27 04:00 (UTC+0)      

🚀 Spot trading pair: SOL/USDT

 

During the event period, commit WXT or SOL via WE-Launch to share 120 SOL for free! Complete the net buy task to earn an additional share of 1,000 USDT!

How to participate:

Commit WXT or SOL in WE-Launch to earn SOL.

The system will calculate the airdrop rewards for each participating user after the WXT and SOL commitment period ends. The actual committed amount must meet the minimum requirement for each tier, and the effective commitment is calculated based on the corresponding tier's commitment multiplier. The larger your effective commitment percentage, the greater your share of the reward pool.

  • Estimated reward = (user's current effective commitment ÷ total effective commitment of all users) × total reward pool.
  • User's effective commitment = user's actual commitment × commitment multiplier of the corresponding tier.

* Your WXT holding can be committed to more than one project at the same time without needing lockup, and there are no staking requirements.

 

 

About Solana (SOL)

Solana is a high-performance network that enables fast, secure, and affordable digital transactions. It powers thousands of applications ranging from payments and games to digital art and financial services. This chapter introduces the fundamentals of how Solana works and what makes it unique.

 

Additional Information

Website

X account

 

Terms & Conditions:
  • No fees are required for participation in the WE-Launch event.
  • During the campaign, there are no restrictions on the WXT in your account; you may trade or withdraw at any time.
  • The airdrop snapshot does not include any WXT that is locked.
  • Market makers and project team accounts are not eligible to participate in this campaign.
  • The use of malicious tactics, including wash trading, volume manipulation, the creation of multiple accounts for profit, or falsifying KYC information, to meet campaign qualifications is strictly prohibited. WEEX reserves the right to disqualify participants from the campaign, withhold rewards, and recover any activity rewards credited to accounts.
  • WEEX retains the final interpretation rights of this campaign. The platform reserves the right to adjust or terminate the campaign based on market conditions without prior notice to users. For any inquiries, please contact our online customer services.

articles.name: WEEX is about to Launch WXT Staking!
articles.title: WEEX is about to Launch WXT Staking!
articles.body:
Dear WEEX Users,

WEEX will officially launch WXT Staking on 2026/03/20  10:00 UTC+0 .

 Users can participate in staking directly on the WEEX platform and earn Staking rewards by holding tokens.

Please refer to the on-page information for specific rules and participation details.

 

WXT Staking Basic Information

Project Name: WEEX Token

Token Name: WXT

Staking Type: Flexible and Fixed

Estimated Annual Percentage Rate (APR): 

Flexible ：1%
Fixed：2.5%

Supported Platforms: WEEX App / Web

Through WEEX Staking, users can complete subscription, holding, and reward earning directly on the platform without complex on-chain operations or asset transfers.

 

About Staking

Staking is an asset value-added service launched by WEEX,

designed to help users manage their assets more steadily and achieve long-term returns in a volatile market.

The launch of WXT Staking provides token holders with a more flexible and convenient way to earn rewards.

articles.body:

The relevant platform functions have now been fully restored, and your trading experience has returned to normal. We sincerely appreciate your patience and understanding if you encountered any inconvenience earlier.
 

Please rest assured that your account assets have always been safe, and you can now perform all operations normally. If you experience any minor issues, we recommend restarting the App, which usually restores normal functionality.
